attributes.description: Single cluster deep dive with health summary, resource usage & capacity, node health, and top consumers.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), names = VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name), names = VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " clusters"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC 
| LIMIT 100

FROM logs-k8seventsreceiver.otel*
| KEEP @timestamp, body.*, severity_text, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name
| SORT @timestamp DESC 
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cpu, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_memory, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU usage across all nodes vs total cluster CPU capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs cluster capacity

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

embeddableConfig.description: Total memory working set across all nodes vs total cluster memory capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: Memory usage vs cluster capacity

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_disk, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)
| EVAL total_gb = ROUND(total_disk, 2)
| KEEP total_gb

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    alloc = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.node.name
| STATS total_usage = SUM(usage), total_alloc = SUM(alloc)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, total_usage, total_alloc

embeddableConfig.description: Total disk usage across all nodes vs total cluster disk capacity (two-stage aggregation: MAX per node, then SUM across nodes).
embeddableConfig.title: Disk usage vs cluster capacity

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
| KEEP utilization

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
| KEEP utilization

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
        avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(avg_usage / avg_cap, 4)
| KEEP utilization

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
        avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(avg_usage / avg_cap, 4)
| KEEP utilization

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
| KEEP utilization

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
| KEEP utilization

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) 
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod Count`

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Pod Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) 
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Pod Count`

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods running over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name)

embeddableConfig.description: Total node count in this cluster. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name).

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Nodes in Ready state. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE condition_ready > 0.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS not_ready = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready <= 0

embeddableConfig.description: Nodes not in Ready state. COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE condition_ready <= 0.

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*

  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-*

  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
  BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
  BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

embeddableConfig.description: CPU utilization per node as bar chart. sum(k8s.node.cpu.usage) / sum(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) by node.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
  BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
        avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS utilization = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4)
  BY k8s.node.name
| SORT utilization DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.node.name, utilization

embeddableConfig.description: Memory utilization per node as bar chart. sum(k8s.node.memory.working_set) / sum(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) by node.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by memory utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready_val     = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_press_val = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    mem_available = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    cpu_usage     = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws        = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage      = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap        = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    pods          = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_val == 1, "Ready",
      ready_val == 0, "Not Ready",
      ready_val == -1, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(
      mem_press_val == 0, "No",
      mem_press_val == 1, "Yes",
      "Unknown"),
    cpu_util  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_util  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, ready, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_util, disk_util, mem_available, k8s.cluster.name
| SORT cpu_util DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready_val     = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    mem_press_val = MAX(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure),
    mem_available = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    cpu_usage     = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws        = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem     = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage      = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap        = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    pods          = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_val == 1, "Ready",
      ready_val == 0, "Not Ready",
      ready_val == -1, "Unknown",
      "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(
      mem_press_val == 0, "No",
      mem_press_val == 1, "Yes",
      "Unknown"),
    cpu_util  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4),
    mem_util  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, ready, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_util, disk_util, mem_available, k8s.cluster.name
| SORT cpu_util DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Node listing with ready status, conditions, pod count, CPU/memory/disk utilization. Drills down to Node Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Nodes

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_cpu = SUM(pod_cpu) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, ns_cpu

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_cpu = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_cpu = SUM(pod_cpu) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, ns_cpu

embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 namespaces by CPU usage. sum(k8s.pod.cpu.usage) by namespace.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by CPU usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_mem = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_mem = SUM(pod_mem) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_mem DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, ns_mem

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_mem = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set) BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS ns_mem = SUM(pod_mem) BY k8s.namespace.name
| SORT ns_mem DESC
| LIMIT 10
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name, ns_mem

embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 namespaces by memory usage. sum(k8s.pod.memory.working_set) by namespace.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 namespaces by memory usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep = CASE(
    is_deploy == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep == 1
| STATS
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    available    = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL)
| EVAL is_deploy = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep = CASE(
    is_deploy == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep == 1
| STATS
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    available    = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts),
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT cpu_usage DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 pods by CPU usage with restart counts. avg(k8s.pod.cpu.usage). Drills down to Pod Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by CPU usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    memory_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT memory_ws DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    memory_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    restarts  = MAX(restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0))
| SORT memory_ws DESC
| LIMIT 10
